allow: Bash(cd "d:/桌面/study/信安赛/RobotSecuritySystem - 副本/motion/0615" && mkdir -p raw_pcaps && mv seq1.pcap seq2.pcap seq3.pcap seq4.pcap seq5.pcap seq6.pcap seq7.pcap seq8.pcap raw_pcaps/ && mv 0613/*.pcap raw_pcaps/ && echo "=== raw_pcaps 内容 \(应为20个\) ===" && ls raw_pcaps/ | sort && echo "count:" && ls raw_pcaps/*.pcap | wc -l)
